items.title: Salesforce (CRM) Expands AI-Driven Customer Experiences Through Deeper NiCE Collaboration
items.description: Salesforce (CRM) took a 6% dip in its share price last week amidst a backdrop of positive market trends, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq hitting record highs. While the company announced an expanded partnership with NiCE to integrate AI-driven services into its Service Cloud, this development seemed at odds with the broader market momentum and didn't provide enough uplift to counteract the decline. Additionally, Sprout Social's collaboration with Salesforce, enhancing social media management...

items.title: CRM Bets on ADAM Framework: Will it Fortify Leadership in Agentic AI?
items.description: Salesforce's ADAM framework, which includes Agents, Data, Apps, and Metadata, aims to power safe, scalable AI agents and fuel the company's next growth phase.

items.title: Saudi Arabia Cloud Computing Market Outlook and Company Analysis Report 2025-2033 Featuring Google, AWS,  Alibaba, Microsoft, Oracle, CloudSigma, VMware, Salesforce, Saudi Telecom Co, IBM
items.description: The Saudi Arabia Cloud Computing Market is set for significant growth, with a projected CAGR of 11.33% from 2025 to 2033, reaching US$ 38.23 billion by 2033, up from US$ 14.55 billion in 2024. This expansion is driven by digital transformation, increased enterprise cloud adoption, and government initiatives under Vision 2030 aimed at modernizing IT infrastructure and fostering innovation.
